text: In any surgical procedure, there are basic steps.
In laparoscopic right colectomy, there are also very basic steps.
The surgeon mobilizes the colon laparoscopically, preparing it for the resection of the right colon.
The steps of a laparoscopic right colectomy appear on the slide.
In a prior video, part one, we looked at steps two, three, four, and five.
The surgeon mobilizes the terminal ileum towards the hepatic flexure, preparing the colon for resection during the laparoscopic right colectomy.
There are other videos on this channel showing basic steps of laparoscopic colectomies and other procedures.
